sourceAuthority: Queensland Office of the Queensland Parliamentary Counsel

access.authentication: maintainer-controlled API account; credentials must not be committed
access.rateLimits: subject to the Queensland API usage agreement and may be changed by OQPC
access.licence: CC BY 4.0 unless the Queensland legislation copyright statement says otherwise

authority.notesAndAnnotationsStatus: aids only; not part of the legislation

adapterMapping.search: Not enabled until the registered API Swagger contract is captured and mapped.
adapterMapping.retrieval: Future adapter may retrieve API representations after access and provenance review.
adapterMapping.versioning: Use API-provided identifiers and effective-date fields; do not infer versions from filenames.
adapterMapping.export: Unsupported until source-backed export mapping and tests exist.
adapterMapping.provenance: Emit source authority, jurisdiction, endpoint, format, and retrieval timestamp.
adapterMapping.unsupported: Return structured unsupported_provider_capability for runtime operations until gates pass.

fixturePolicy: metadata-only source-shape fixture; no legal text or fabricated records
